pilot.name: Ascend Pilot

pilot.pilot_fee_is_install: The $15,000 Pilot fee covers the Ascend install scope. Pilot graduates begin Ascend at $7,000/mo recurring with no additional install fee — they've already paid for it.
deliverables: Day 0: Contract signature + 1:1 ad-spend gate verified + capacity audit (Brain SOP § Process: Client Acquisition Engine)

Days 8-45: Proof sprint on the single highest-leverage layer from the proven-layer menu (Paid Media excluded until BWM own-funnel paid leads proven)
Live read-only attribution dashboard (bwm-form-handler + UTM taxonomy, identical to operational tier dashboards)
Weekly performance report against the layer's KPI (delivered Sunday, automated)
Day 45 conversion conversation — proof sprint outcome reviewed; if both agree, Ascend operating contract starts at $7,000/mo (install fee waived since Pilot fee covered it)

proven_layer_menu.policy: Pilot install scope restricted to layers BWM has already shipped for clients. Paid Media is excluded until own-funnel paid leads are proven (per dogfood lock v6.3 — 0 own-funnel paid leads lifetime as of 2026-05-20).

2 · Conversion — landing pages + form handler + UTM-tagged attribution (proven: bwm-form-handler LIVE for all 6 clients)
3 · Speed-to-Lead — email/SMS instant-touch automation (email worker LIVE; SMS worker queued)
4 · Sales Ops — CRM hygiene + pipeline stages + lost-lead reactivation (proven: bwm-command LIVE)
5 · Reputation — review-request automation + reply cadence (proven: ASAP / D2S patterns)
7 · Reporting — first-touch + last-touch attribution + booked-job stitching (proven: D2S attribution LIVE 2026-04-21)
8 · Strategy — weekly growth diagnosis + next-best-action (proven: every BWM client gets this via Bob orchestrator)
excluded_from_pilot_install_until_dogfoo: 6 · Paid Media — Meta + Google + LSA orchestration (BWM has 0 own-funnel paid leads lifetime; selling this as a Pilot install would violate honest-product principle)

territorial_exclusivity.model: Two-tier · default cap + opt-in Territory Lock add-on (Brain SOP products/Product-Ascend-Pro.md § Territory Lock)
territorial_exclusivity.default_cap_description: Ascend Pro default = at most 2 clients per territory (same GBP category × metro-or-30mi-radius). Both clients share the operational depth; neither gets refusal-of-competitors.

territory_lock_add_on.name: Territory Lock
territory_lock_add_on.cap_with_lock_description: Drops territory cap to 1 — BWM contractually refuses qualifying competitors in the locked territory for the duration of the engagement.
territory_lock_add_on.rationale: Reflects ~$210K/yr forgone ARR per locked territory · anchor is floor not ceiling · revisit after first 3-5 Lock signings
territory_lock_add_on.definition_of_qualifying_competitor: An independent third-party service-trade operator in the locked client's GBP category × locked metro × 30-mile radius · operates under its own brand · its own customers · its own P&L · would consume the locked client's market share if onboarded.
carve_outs: BWM-owned vertically-integrated AI-native service brands (e.g. a robotics-augmented HVAC operation built by BWM, using the BWM system internally) — NOT 'competitors' for Territory Lock purposes. They are platform extensions, not third-party operators. Disclosed in MSA at signature.

Affiliated brands operating under common ownership/control with the Locked client (their own multi-location / multi-brand expansion) — Territory Lock protects against EXTERNAL competitors, not the Locked client's own brand extensions.

ServiceTitan / BuildOps / Avoca / Housecall Pro vertical-SaaS partnerships where BWM's system is co-distributed — partnership-driven distribution does not introduce new third-party operators into the territory.
territory_lock_add_on.carve_out_rationale: Territory Lock protects against parity-competitive threats — a rival operator buying the same system to outrun the Locked client. BWM-owned brands using the system internally are not parity threats; they're the platform extending itself. Carve-out preserves Phase 3 platform-pivot optionality (Bob OS GA Y3 Q1-Q2 + potential vertically-integrated AI-native service brands) without contracting it away at first Lock signing. Disclosure-at-signature is non-negotiable — Locked clients sign with eyes open.

territorial_exclusivity.y3_plus_permanent: Permanent exclusivity available on Territory Lock clients once pipeline density supports turning away next-best buyer
operational_requirements: Territory registry (per-client lock status + defined territory in Supabase)
Sales-qualification gate: new Ascend Pro prospects in locked territories get routed to waitlist or referred out
Disclosure: when default-cap territory has 1 of 2 slots filled, new prospect sees slot count
territorial_exclusivity.supersedes: v6 plan default '1 per metro' (CLAUDE.md 2026-05-19) — that lock conflicted with Brain SOP and forced unnecessary refusals at the default tier without offering the Lock upgrade revenue

company.brand_spine: BWM builds an AI growth system on the client's domain, runs it on their behalf, and leaves the asset in their hands.

install_fee_waiver.pilot_to_ascend: The $15,000 Pilot fee covers the Ascend install scope. Pilot graduates begin Ascend at $7,000/mo recurring only — no additional install fee, regardless of conversion timing within the Day-45 window.
install_fee_waiver.ascend_to_ascend_pro: $25,000 Pro install waived if Ascend → Pro graduation accepted within 7 days of the $1,000,000 qualified-pipeline trigger (per Brain SOP Process-Ascend-→-Ascend-Pro-Graduation.md)

trigger_conditions_all_required: ≥10 active clients meeting the ROI floor

ai_ae_q3_2026.title: AI AE agent
ai_ae_q3_2026.implementation: Custom Bob orchestrator workflows + Sonnet/Codex agents · zero new human headcount
scope: Mini-Dossier reply triage (inbound responses to outbound + warm-lead retargeting)
Pre-call dossier prep (deeper company research before founder teardown)
Post-call admin (CRM updates · proposal generation · contract drafting · follow-up cadence)
ai_ae_q3_2026.human_stratum_retained: Founder retains the teardown conversation + the Pro close · that's the high-leverage human stratum
ai_ae_q3_2026.rationale: Founder model breaks at ~20 clients ONLY if the founder is also doing AE admin work. Strip the AE function from the founder + automate it = founder closes through 30-client cap without a human AE.

ai_ae_2_y2_y3.title: AI AE 2.0 · capability expansion
scope: SMS nurture cadence with two-way conversation
Custom vertical workflows (ServiceTitan / BuildOps / Avoca / Housecall Pro)
ai_ae_2_y2_y3.rationale: Iteration on the AI AE agent, not a second human hire. Composes with Bob IP codification cadence (≥80% of orchestration workflows captured as proprietary artifacts by EOY2 Q2).

human_pro_closer_y3_conditional.title: Human Pro-tier closer · conditional · default = hold
human_pro_closer_y3_conditional.trigger: ONLY if Pro-tier pipeline density > 8 qualified prospects/quarter AND founder's calendar is the hard bottleneck for Pro closes (not for Ascend closes — those route to AI AE qualification + founder via async path). Default = hold across all 3 years.
human_pro_closer_y3_conditional.rationale: Composes with No-Employees Goal LOCKED 2026-04-28 — bias every spec toward 'no human team member needed.' If we hit this trigger, the Pro closer is the FIRST possible human hire — not the default expected one.

hires.explicitly_not_hired: SDRs · BDRs · field reps · marketing managers · Account Executives (replaced by AI AE agent Q3 2026 build) · Customer Success reps (Bob handles Ascend ops post-install) · the no-employees goal is biased into every team decision · humans handle teardown + Pro close · AI handles everything around the conversation

clients.cap_phase_1_rationale: Protects delivery quality + HITL throughput + 70/30 operating model · re-evaluation gate at EOY1 + EOY2 milestones
